programme.title: E120 - The School Fete
programme.desc: Peppa and her family go to the school fair, and do lots of stuff while they're there. Peppa and her friends get their faces painted as tigers.

programme.title: E204 - Dreams And Illusions / Dreaming Apprentices
programme.desc: While everyone sleeps peacefully, one may wonder what the Barbababies could be dreaming about. // To dream makes you grow... But what can Barbidur, Barbalala, Barbotine and Barbidou possibly dream of?

programme.title: E102 - Holly's Magic Wand / The Elf Farm
programme.desc: Holly needs her wand to do magic. When she loses it, Ben has to use his elf skills to find it. // Holly goes with Ben and Mr Elf to the Elf Farm. While there, a huge chicken escapes and Holly and the elves have to chase it across the Little Kingdom.

programme.title: E114 - The Crew Builds A Splash Park / The Crew Builds A Playroom
programme.desc: With their splash park plans in troubled waters, the pups have to get creative to cool down the town for the summer. // As the pups work on building a surprise playroom for Lucas and Lily, a squirrelly visitor causes construction complications.

programme.title: E407 - The Crew Builds A Corn Silo
programme.desc: Rubble and Wheeler team up to construct a solution for a mysterious mess on Farmer Zoe's farm.

programme.title: E816 - Strawberries
programme.desc: Grandpa and Granny Pig have been growing strawberries to make jam, but the birds have eaten them all! Instead, they go with Peppa and George to Miss Rabbit's strawberry farm.

programme.title: E407 - The Crew Builds A Corn Silo
programme.desc: Rubble and Wheeler team up to construct a solution for a mysterious mess on Farmer Zoe's farm.

programme.title: E106 - It's Only A Mystery... / The Battle
programme.desc: Taking after his favourite detective, Barbabravo looks for a case to solve. Can he solve the mystery of the missing ice statue? // Inspired by their favourite heroes, the Barbababies make costumes. But no heroes are possible without villains...

programme.title: E201 - Storm
programme.desc: When a storm keeps the Rexes at home they must think of a game to pass the time.

programme.title: E407 - The Crew Builds A Corn Silo
programme.desc: Rubble and Wheeler team up to construct a solution for a mysterious mess on Farmer Zoe's farm.

programme.title: E123 - The New Car
programme.desc: The family car breaks down, so Peppa and her family rent a new one, but it starts acting crazy.

programme.title: E226 - The Mountain Eater / The First Day Of School
programme.desc: Barbapapa tells the Barbababies about his extraordinary encounter with a wolf. // Tomorrow is the Barbababies' first day of school.

programme.title: E520 - The Race Around The Earth
programme.desc: In their biggest race ever, Blaze and AJ go head-to-head against Crusher to race all the way around the Earth and win the World's Biggest Trophy!

programme.title: E608 - Pups Save Chickaletta's Egg
programme.desc: Chickaletta has laid an egg, but it's rolled away and is heading through town. The Paw Patrol has to catch it before it breaks.

programme.title: E718 - Pups Save Little Hairy / Pups Save A Kooky Klimber
programme.desc: Big Hairy's little brother falls into a hole and Tracker gets carried away by Big Hairy. It's time for a Jungle Rescue! // Daring Danny tries extreme rock climbing with Ace Sorenson. It's up to the Paw Patrol to save the duo.

programme.title: E209 - Times Machine / Super Tim / Uncle Tiberius
programme.desc: Tim and Tia build a time machine to avoid telling Dad the truth. // Tim goes to DinoStar's training academy, but is confused by his hero's training methods. // Uncle Tiberius comes to visit the Rexes, and Tim must be on his best behaviour.

programme.title: E204 - Dreams And Illusions / Dreaming Apprentices
programme.desc: While everyone sleeps peacefully, one may wonder what the Barbababies could be dreaming about. // To dream makes you grow... But what can Barbidur, Barbalala, Barbotine and Barbidou possibly dream of?

programme.title: E926 - Charger Visits The Pups / Pups Save A Shiny Ride
programme.desc: Rubble's cousin, Charger, visits Adventure Bay just in time to help out when a Humdinger-caused geyser destroys Mr. Porter's cafe. // Mayor Humdinger hatches a plan to sabotage a 'Shinest Ride Contest', so it's up to the Paw Patrol to save the day.

programme.title: E104 - Boots / Moon Parrot / Tailball
programme.desc: Tim tries out some new rocket boots which soon fly out of control. // Tim, Tommy and Tia bird-sit the Bronte's MoonParrot. // Tim, Tommy and Tia take on their parents at Tailball.

programme.title: E112 - The Secret Of The Sand Serpent / The Disappearance Of Peggy Scratch
programme.desc: Sam and Kit save a town from being pulled underground by a legendary serpent. // The pals search for their team leader after crashing during a flight test.

Ils sont les têtes d'affiches des genres musicaux les plus écoutés aujourd'hui mais sont parfois méconnus du grand public. Une découverte de la face cachée' de ces artistes, derrière les clichés, les postures, et loin de l'actualité promotionnelle.'

programme.title: Légendes urbaines

Une découverte de la face cachée' de ces artistes, derrière les clichés, les postures, et loin de l'actualité promotionnelle.'

programme.title: Focus[Live]
programme.desc: Keep up with the latest news from all over the globe with Focus on France 24. Focus programme provides exclusive reports from Monday to Friday at 7.50 am Paris time. Find out what's going on in the world of economy, politics, culture, sport, medicine, ecology. Focus has it all covered for you. Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

programme.title: Eye On Africa[Live]
programme.desc: Join Georja Calvin-Smith for all the news from Africa and the Maghreb, together with France 24's correspondents and guests of the show. Eye on Africa is on every week day twice a day. programme.title: Why The US Is Turning Away From Electric Vehicles
programme.desc: US carmakers are pivoting back to combustion engines as the Trump Administration rolls back Biden-era subsidies and EV-friendly policies. But China and the EU are ramping up. Is the US at risk of being left behind? Transforming Business looks at the consequences of the big EV rollback.

programme.title: Why The US Is Turning Away From Electric Vehicles
programme.desc: US carmakers are pivoting back to combustion engines as the Trump Administration rolls back Biden-era subsidies and EV-friendly policies. But China and the EU are ramping up. Is the US at risk of being left behind? Transforming Business looks at the consequences of the big EV rollback.

programme.title: Could You Still Afford To Live In Cape Town Today?
programme.desc: Cape Town's iconic beaches and upmarket housing is shadowed by severe inequality and gang violence that plagues many residents. This week, The 77 Percent explores how young people are trying to improve their communities.

programme.title: Breakthrough Innovation Made In Germany: How Sprin-D Turns Ideas Into Marke
programme.desc: Germany excels at invention but often fails to scale it. The SPRIN-D agency aims to speed up the path from research to market-ready technologies.

programme.title: San Michele - Venice's Cemetery Island
programme.desc: Venice is a city unlike any other, so it's no surprise its cemetery is also unique. Located halfway between the city of Venice and the glassblowing island of Murano, Venetians find their final resting place on the cemetery island of San Michele.

programme.title: Displaced On The Island Of Java - A Village Sinking Into The Sea
programme.desc: In 2014, the first flood caught the sleeping residents of the Javanese village off guard. Since then, rising sea tides have kept engulfing the village. The water is still rising - up to 15 centimeters in a year.

programme.title: Small Pacific Islands With A Big Strategy
programme.desc: The Pacific is a strategic location for big powers, but Pacific Island countries are using power competition to their advantage. They strike smart deals and join forces - all while facing an existential threat.

programme.title: Could You Still Afford To Live In Cape Town Today?
programme.desc: Cape Town's iconic beaches and upmarket housing is shadowed by severe inequality and gang violence that plagues many residents. This week, The 77 Percent explores how young people are trying to improve their communities.

programme.title: Displaced On The Island Of Java - A Village Sinking Into The Sea
programme.desc: In 2014, the first flood caught the sleeping residents of the Javanese village off guard. Since then, rising sea tides have kept engulfing the village. The water is still rising - up to 15 centimeters in a year.

programme.title: Breakthrough Innovation Made In Germany: How Sprin-D Turns Ideas Into Marke
programme.desc: Germany excels at invention but often fails to scale it. The SPRIN-D agency aims to speed up the path from research to market-ready technologies.

Anchored by Joe Kernen, Becky Quick and Andrew Ross Sorkin, the show brings Wall Street to Main Street. It's a must-see for everyone from the professional trader to the casual investor.

programme.title: Squawk On The Street
programme.desc: Headquartered live on the floor of the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) where the biggest companies in the world trade, “Squawk On The Street” tracks the action of every stock and gives you access to the treasury, currency and commodity action in real time.

programme.title: E1 - So Many Fun Things to Discover!
programme.desc: There are so many fun things to discover with Mia, Max & their friends! First, they head to the park for some rolling fun as they play Jack & Jill, rolling down the muddy grass & whizzing down the slide! Then, Max gets his first sippy cup & is so excited to show it off that he starts an impromptu tea party with all his playmates. The day of discovery ends with a rainy day competition to see who can make the biggest puddle splash of all!

programme.title: E4 - Buster’s Big Football Match
programme.desc: Join Buster for a big day of soccer! He's excited to play, but learns that being a team player is the real way to win. Help Buster overcome his nerves, score a goal, and show that having fun with friends is the best prize of all!

programme.title: E9 - Football Fever: Goals & Grooves
programme.desc: Join JJ for a packed day of fun! Compete in a giant soccer match, play basketball against animal friends, and hit a home run in baseball. Then, put on your detective hat to solve the mystery of the ten missing buses. It’s a day of sports and fun!

programme.title: E3 - Cody’s Football Season Training Camp
programme.desc: Get ready for game day with Cody's training camp! Imagine racing on extreme motor trikes, join friends on the playground, and go on a fun family hike. Learn about healthy foods at the grocery store to get strong for the big football season!

programme.title: E2 - Pitch Perfect Playtime Party
programme.desc: Come to a playtime party with Mia and her friends! Roll and bounce with Twinkle the magic ball, find the courage to jump into a giant ball pit, and pretend to be hopping kangaroos. End the day with a fun dance party where everyone shakes their bums!

programme.title: E4 - Buster’s Big Football Match
programme.desc: Join Buster for a big day of soccer! He's excited to play, but learns that being a team player is the real way to win. Help Buster overcome his nerves, score a goal, and show that having fun with friends is the best prize of all!

programme.title: E3 - Wonders Of The World & Beyond!
programme.desc: Join Blippi on an adventure to the wonders of our world & beyond! First, he travels to the tallest mountain on Earth, Mt. Everest, with his new friend Betty the Yeti. Then, he dives deep into the ocean to explore a kelp forest with Jerry the Jellyfish. The adventure gets explosive as Blippi & FETCH fly into a volcano! After exploring the Earth, Blippi blasts off into space to tour the solar system, learn about gravity on the moon & discover how rainbows get their amazing colors!

programme.title: E1 - Squirrel Trouble & Other Wacky Problems!
programme.desc: Arpo is dealing with squirrel trouble & other wacky problems! That pesky squirrel is always trying to steal food or run off with Baby Daniel's teddy bear. But the wacky problems don't stop there! When a ghost crashes playtime, Arpo has to use all his tech to bust it. Then, Arpo's own systems go haywire, like when a toy's music makes him dance uncontrollably & when Baby Daniel accidentally terrorizes him with a magnet. It's a day of very wacky problems!

programme.title: E4 - Buster’s Big Football Match
programme.desc: Join Buster for a big day of soccer! He's excited to play, but learns that being a team player is the real way to win. Help Buster overcome his nerves, score a goal, and show that having fun with friends is the best prize of all!

programme.title: E1 - The Ultimate Rescue Missions!
programme.desc: Join Gecko for some of his ultimate rescue missions! Blue must face his fear of a storm to save Eric the Excavator, who is stuck in a trench with a dam about to overflow! Then, Weasel fits Vicky the Ice Cream truck with a super-fast rocket, causing her to speed out of control! Gecko & the Mechanicals must stop her before she crashes. From saving a trapped Mummy Truck to rescuing the Mechs, it's always a big adventure!

programme.title: E3 - The Garage Football Championship
programme.desc: Join Gecko for the garage football championship! When Weasel starts cheating, Gecko must fix the damaged players and use smart strategy to win the game. Help Gecko show everyone that playing fair is the only way to be a true champion!

programme.title: E1 - A Super Fun Underwater Sing-Along!
programme.desc: Get ready for a super fun underwater sing-along with The Sharksons! Join the fun as five little reef sharks learn their lesson about jumping on the bed. Then, meet an 'Itsy Bitsy' sea spider who keeps trying to climb an underwater cliff with a little help from her friends! The classic rhymes continue with a curious crab acting out the story of Humpty Dumpty & a cozy pajama party with ten friends in a bed. It's a sing-along full of classic tunes with a fun, fishy twist!

programme.title: E3 - Cody’s Football Season Training Camp
programme.desc: Get ready for game day with Cody's training camp! Imagine racing on extreme motor trikes, join friends on the playground, and go on a fun family hike. Learn about healthy foods at the grocery store to get strong for the big football season!

programme.title: E2 - Pitch Perfect Playtime Party
programme.desc: Come to a playtime party with Mia and her friends! Roll and bounce with Twinkle the magic ball, find the courage to jump into a giant ball pit, and pretend to be hopping kangaroos. End the day with a fun dance party where everyone shakes their bums!

programme.title: E4 - Buster’s Big Football Match
programme.desc: Join Buster for a big day of soccer! He's excited to play, but learns that being a team player is the real way to win. Help Buster overcome his nerves, score a goal, and show that having fun with friends is the best prize of all!

programme.title: E4 - JJ's Magical Dreamland Dance Party!
programme.desc: Join JJ for a dance party in a magical dreamland! Blast off to outer space to sing & dance among the stars with a friendly Bunny Astronaut. Then, travel to imaginary lands to party with magical friends like unicorns & mermaids! The adventure continues as you stomp your feet & snap your claws along with dinosaurs to the 'Snap, Snap, Snap' song. With fun copy-me dances & beautiful ballet moves, it's a dance party beyond your wildest dreams!

programme.title: E1 - So Many Fun Things to Discover!

programme.title: E1 - When Buster's Dreams Come to Life!
programme.desc: Join Buster as his amazing dreams come to life! First, he dreams he is a fish, complete with a tail & fins! He's scared when he meets a big shark, but soon learns the shark just wants a friend to play with. Then, it's all stations go as Buster dreams he's a space rocket & blasts off to tour all the planets! The dreams continue as he becomes Sheriff Buster in the wild west & finds a magic spell book that causes all sorts of trouble!

programme.title: E3 - Cody’s Football Season Training Camp
programme.desc: Get ready for game day with Cody's training camp! Imagine racing on extreme motor trikes, join friends on the playground, and go on a fun family hike. Learn about healthy foods at the grocery store to get strong for the big football season!

programme.title: E1 - Mom's Crazy Inventions Go Haywire!
programme.desc: Mom's crazy inventions are going haywire! First, Arpo & Daniel have fun with the new voice-controlled smart house, until it starts having a tantrum & they have to figure out how to calm it down. Then, Mom's new time travel machine accidentally turns a pigeon into a giant pterodactyl, forcing Arpo to catch it! The mayhem continues when Daniel takes a flying smartcrib on a joyride & Arpo has to chase a remote-controlled truck that's gone out of control!

programme.title: E1 - Squirrel Trouble & Other Wacky Problems!
programme.desc: Arpo is dealing with squirrel trouble & other wacky problems! That pesky squirrel is always trying to steal food or run off with Baby Daniel's teddy bear. But the wacky problems don't stop there! When a ghost crashes playtime, Arpo has to use all his tech to bust it. Then, Arpo's own systems go haywire, like when a toy's music makes him dance uncontrollably & when Baby Daniel accidentally terrorizes him with a magnet. It's a day of very wacky problems!

programme.title: E1 - When Buster's Dreams Come to Life!
programme.desc: Join Buster as his amazing dreams come to life! First, he dreams he is a fish, complete with a tail & fins! He's scared when he meets a big shark, but soon learns the shark just wants a friend to play with. Then, it's all stations go as Buster dreams he's a space rocket & blasts off to tour all the planets! The dreams continue as he becomes Sheriff Buster in the wild west & finds a magic spell book that causes all sorts of trouble!

programme.title: E4 - Buster’s Big Football Match
programme.desc: Join Buster for a big day of soccer! He's excited to play, but learns that being a team player is the real way to win. Help Buster overcome his nerves, score a goal, and show that having fun with friends is the best prize of all!

programme.title: E3 - The Garage Football Championship
programme.desc: Join Gecko for the garage football championship! When Weasel starts cheating, Gecko must fix the damaged players and use smart strategy to win the game. Help Gecko show everyone that playing fair is the only way to be a true champion!

programme.title: E2 - Pitch Perfect Playtime Party
programme.desc: Come to a playtime party with Mia and her friends! Roll and bounce with Twinkle the magic ball, find the courage to jump into a giant ball pit, and pretend to be hopping kangaroos. End the day with a fun dance party where everyone shakes their bums!

programme.title: E2 - Pitch Perfect Playtime Party
programme.desc: Come to a playtime party with Mia and her friends! Roll and bounce with Twinkle the magic ball, find the courage to jump into a giant ball pit, and pretend to be hopping kangaroos. End the day with a fun dance party where everyone shakes their bums!

Then, Arpo's own systems go haywire, like when a toy's music makes him dance uncontrollably & when Baby Daniel accidentally terrorizes him with a magnet. It's a day of very wacky problems!

programme.title: E1 - So Many Fun Things to Discover!
programme.desc: There are so many fun things to discover with Mia, Max & their friends! First, they head to the park for some rolling fun as they play Jack & Jill, rolling down the muddy grass & whizzing down the slide! Then, Max gets his first sippy cup & is so excited to show it off that he starts an impromptu tea party with all his playmates. The day of discovery ends with a rainy day competition to see who can make the biggest puddle splash of all!

programme.desc: Two sailors (Sinatra and Kelly) in Hollywood looking for glamorous movie starlets find romance, dance with a cartoon mouse and help a young starlet get discovered--all during one shore leave.

programme.title: E27 - In It Together
programme.desc: Wendy and Thelma are spending the summer holidays at their grandfather's house in the heart of nature. As city dwellers, they're worried about getting bored. But this summer, the two sisters discover that their grandfather's estate is more than just a park: it is home to chimeras, amazing creatures with magical powers.

programme.title: E8 - Once Upon A Time In Alaska
programme.desc: Diego Bunuel travels to Alaska to witness the migration of wild salmon. Every summer, 200 million salmon return from the Pacific to Alaska's rivers to spawn. The event is strictly regulated by fishing quotas for the many American fishermen.

programme.title: E18 - Circus
programme.desc: The circus bus has broken down, but the children are waiting for a circus show! Can Stanley help out?

programme.title: E35 - Smoochy Kiss
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want Dad all to themselves and will not let Mum have a smoochy kiss. They try to hide him all around the house, but Mum is desperate to spend a little romance time with her husband.

programme.title: E34 - The Comic Badge
programme.desc: Duggee is reading the Squirrels one of his favourite comics.

programme.title: E7 - Cucumber
programme.desc: Live from the Roots & Fruits theatre, it's Cucumber performing Cool Under Pressure while trying to not let any obstacle ruin her calm routine.

programme.title: E2 - Umbrella
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'umbrella', and we go on a whirlwind word adventure.

programme.title: E39 - Exercise
programme.desc: Dad thinks he needs to do some exercise, but Bingo pretends to be Boss Bluey's new employee in the middle of Dad's backyard workout.

programme.title: E38 - Cubby
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo build a very special cubby for their stuffed toy Kimjim.

programme.title: E13 - The Good Choices
programme.desc: The Squirrels haven't been making good choices round the messy clubhouse. With Duggee's help, they start to get it right. But not before sending Roly's imagination into overdrive!

programme.title: E14 - The Colosseum, Italy
programme.desc: Glitch visits Rome to race his Grimbots in the Colosseum. Can the Go Jetters stop him?

programme.title: E5 - Born Yesterday
programme.desc: Dad pretends he was born yesterday. Bluey and Bingo have to guide him through his second day on Earth, especially when he discovers food is delicious and steals Lucky's Dad's pie.

programme.title: E19 - Go Jet Academy: Sea Arch Escape
programme.desc: Xuli's flying race around the Academy inspires cadet Tala to fly the Grimbler. But she crashes into a fragile sea arch that could collapse right on top of her!

programme.title: E19 - Basking Shark
programme.desc: Sarah is keen to adopt a sea creature, but doesn't get her first choice...

programme.title: E40 - It's Time To Look After Monty
programme.desc: JoJo and Gran Gran look after Ned's dog Monty. JoJo wants to play with Monty all day, but Gran Gran says Monty also needs some food, a walk in the park, and a good brush!

programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want Dad all to themselves and will not let Mum have a smoochy kiss. They try to hide him all around the house, but Mum is desperate to spend a little romance time with her husband.

programme.desc: Betty and Sargent Ant just want perfection but no one seems to be listening to them!

programme.desc: Join the chickens in space for the big finale of Agony and Eggstacy! Mucho Suspense!

programme.title: E430
programme.desc: C'EST LA VIE: C'est La Vie focuses on the real experiences of ordinary people amid the tide of the times. Through in-depth interviews and observational filming, it presents a vivid social visual archive of contemporary China with authentic life stories. With profound humanistic care and compelling narrative tension, it has earned widespread acclaim and numerous awards both at home and abroad, establishing itself as a benchmark in Chinese-language documentaries. Continuously conveying warmth and strength, it inspires viewers to reflect deeply on humanity and destiny.

E1 - Monkey Garden
programme.desc: Explore the southern edge of the Pantanal, where brown capuchin monkeys live in their own Garden of Eden. Dry season in the highlands treats them well until a drought dries up their food sources. Can an industrious agouti save them from starvation?

programme.title: E3 - Island Feast
programme.desc: Off the coast of Oman, summer weather drives nutrients in from the ocean depths where they meet the Arabian sun, causing an explosion of life. Smaller fish spawn, filling the waters with eggs. This creates a buffet predators just can’t resist.

programme.title: E3 - Island Feast

programme.title: E6 - November-December - Full Circle
programme.desc: Witness some of the most incredible natural events in November, from the millions of Monarch butterflies that converge in Mexico’s forests to the deep fog that shrouds the city of Dubai, signalling the start of winter.

programme.title: E3 - Kings of Nsefu
programme.desc: Twin brothers with a powerful bond have ruled the Nsefu pride for three years. They’re fathers to all the young, and protectors of their territory. Witness the struggle that unfolds when rival males target their territory.

programme.title: E4 - The Lost Prince

programme.title: E32
programme.desc: 當紅主播許妍（趙露思飾）和都會精英沈皓明（陳偉霆飾）是一對人人艷羨慕的夫妻，看似十分般配的兩人，由於出生環境的差異，始終難以融入對方的圈子。許妍靠著光鮮的主持人身分和「精心裝點」的身世順利和沈皓明步入婚姻，而這一切盡在沈皓明的掌握下。衝突來臨，許妍脫離沈皓明的掌控一去不回頭。沈皓明卻發現自己早已陷入愛情，想要全力追回許妍。經歷種種，兩人終於撕掉外表的偽裝，重新靠近，會見彼此的內在，也重新認識自己。

programme.title: E32

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 一部以專門經營鬼客人的的士為題材的電視劇。以實現鬼神們最後願望的的士司機為中心，敘述多種多樣的故事。

programme.title: E32
programme.desc: 當紅主播許妍（趙露思飾）和都會精英沈皓明（陳偉霆飾）是一對人人艷羨慕的夫妻，看似十分般配的兩人，由於出生環境的差異，始終難以融入對方的圈子。許妍靠著光鮮的主持人身分和「精心裝點」的身世順利和沈皓明步入婚姻，而這一切盡在沈皓明的掌握下。衝突來臨，許妍脫離沈皓明的掌控一去不回頭。沈皓明卻發現自己早已陷入愛情，想要全力追回許妍。經歷種種，兩人終於撕掉外表的偽裝，重新靠近，會見彼此的內在，也重新認識自己。

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: 資訊工程學系和模特兒系意外合併，燃起了一段閃耀的青春戀情。人氣網紅模特兒姜敏學和對愛情一無所知的優等生朱妍山，成為了新合併系的宣傳模特兒。他們個性上的碰撞，成就了一個溫馨爆笑的愛情故事。

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: 有著「洪吉童」封號的女義賊洪恩祖（南志鉉 飾）專偷貪官的財富，為百姓謀取福祉，怎料在她受到道月大君李烈（文相敏 飾）追捕時，兩人竟然意外互換靈魂！在互換靈魂的期間，兩人拋開成見重新認識彼此，一起攜手守護百姓，最終收穫珍貴的愛情。

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 一部以專門經營鬼客人的的士為題材的電視劇。以實現鬼神們最後願望的的士司機為中心，敘述多種多樣的故事。

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: 資訊工程學系和模特兒系意外合併，燃起了一段閃耀的青春戀情。人氣網紅模特兒姜敏學和對愛情一無所知的優等生朱妍山，成為了新合併系的宣傳模特兒。他們個性上的碰撞，成就了一個溫馨爆笑的愛情故事。

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: 有著「洪吉童」封號的女義賊洪恩祖（南志鉉 飾）專偷貪官的財富，為百姓謀取福祉，怎料在她受到道月大君李烈（文相敏 飾）追捕時，兩人竟然意外互換靈魂！在互換靈魂的期間，兩人拋開成見重新認識彼此，一起攜手守護百姓，最終收穫珍貴的愛情。

programme.desc: In today's elimination, the contestants must create a dish with an element of table side theatre. To help inspire them, the judges showcase their table side theatre trick.

programme.title: Blood Vs. Duty[Live]
programme.desc: Two brothers separated in a maritime tragedy grow up on opposite sides of the law - one a dedicated Intelligence Officer, the other fiercely protective of the Tausug family that raised him. When a corruption case pits them against each other, their long-buried secret threatens to ignite a war between blood and loyalty.

programme.title: 2 Good 2 Be True[Live]
programme.desc: Ali, a hardworking nurse with big dreams, crosses paths with Eloy, a clever mechanic secretly living a double life as a con artist and law student. Their rocky first meeting leads to an unexpected partnership involving a wealthy old man, hidden identities, family secrets, and emotional healing. As love grows amid deception, the series explores trust, redemption, and second chances, blending romance, comedy, and drama.

E21 - Transformation Of A Former Workshop In Liege
programme.desc: In Liege, a visit to a workshop transformed into a family home. Wood, terrazzo, and powdery pink tones create a modern, welcoming atmosphere; near Tours, the incredible cabinet of curiosities at the Courtin house; the organic works of Axelle Gosse; a small piece of furniture made from glass bricks.

programme.title: E78 - Bethune (3)
programme.desc: Flavie Flament visits Bethune, meeting local residents at the market. Today, she goes behind the scenes of the Giants of the North and discovers how French fries are made.

programme.title: E23 - Musee Camille Claudel/Pierre-Emmanuel Lyet/Kidsuper/Atelier Baque Molinie
programme.desc: The Camille Claudel Museum includes works by artists from Nogent. Notebooks, coloured pencils and an overflowing imagination - that's the recipe of illustrator Pierre-Emmanuel Lyet. The models in the Kidsuper catwalk show live in a limitless imaginary world. Laetitia Baque and Victor Molinie are redrawing the contours of contemporary embroidery.

programme.title: E1 - Trout Quenelles
programme.desc: Leila Albert opens the doors of her kitchen to Marc Colin, a former delicatessen chef reputed throughout the Chablis region. programme.title: E12 - 南京總決賽
programme.desc: 由黎明、林依晨、魏晨、謝依霖、鄭元暢、盛一倫、朱珠、李小鵬、王濛、潘曉婷、唐曉天、陳楚河共十二位明星和奧運冠軍參加，以輪換搭檔的形式，在全球十二座體育城市展開一系列競技PK。

programme.title: E11 - 桂滿中秋 (中)
programme.desc: 中的名場面，用現代方式表達其中蘊藏的經典文化與精神內涵，彰顯中華文明突出特性。邀請陳銘、喻恩泰、楊迪、王子異組成「萬卷遊學團」，羅一舟、張凌赫、張曉龍、王耀慶、王鶴棣、曾可妮作為「風雅體驗官」，分別體驗五場穿越千年的古今同游，根據遊學攻略不斷加載知識技能，最終完成「傳世名作名場面」的融創秀。

programme.title: E24
programme.desc: 丁當在訂婚前夕與初戀陳阿明重逢，卻不料對方竟改名餘坤並擁有了新身份，為治癒陳阿明因實驗失敗導致的人格分裂，丁當與友人暗中佈局，以糖衣計劃引導他直面過去的傷痛，從撕裂的情感與記憶中脫困。

programme.title: E7 - Chinese Mystery Snails
programme.desc: In the crystal clear lakes of Northern Wisconsin lurks a peculiar creature... the Chinese Mystery Snail which gets its namesake from female snails giving birth to young, fully developed snails that suddenly and 'mysteriously' appear. Utilized for its high protein, low fat content in China, the mystery snail is a food source believed to aid in treatment of digestive disease. Eager to explore this feral snail as a food source, Yia travels to Clear Lake to meet up with Wisconsin Fisheries Specialist Titus Seilheimer, who's seen first hand the explosion of these snails at his family's lakefront resort.

programme.desc: In the crystal clear lakes of Northern Wisconsin lurks a peculiar creature... the Chinese Mystery Snail which gets its namesake from female snails giving birth to young, fully developed snails that suddenly and 'mysteriously' appear. Utilized for its high protein, low fat content in China, the mystery snail is a food source believed to aid in treatment of digestive disease. Eager to explore this feral snail as a food source, Yia travels to Clear Lake to meet up with Wisconsin Fisheries Specialist Titus Seilheimer, who's seen first hand the explosion of these snails at his family's lakefront resort.

programme.title: E9 - Hard Truths of Conservation
programme.desc: When Dick Cabela founded “Cabela’s” in 1961, he was unaware it would become the foremost outfitting store in the world. So it’s only fitting that his son is on a quest to explore the Hard Truths of conservation. Join Dan Cabela, on this high-impact journey of discovery, as he uncovers some lesser-known facts about conservation. In particular, the role which hunting and the utilization of wildlife can play as a modern-day conservation tool.

programme.desc: The hottest new sport of hybrid games sweeping the world is Hyrox, so the team puts their fitness to the test in Melbourne.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: This film follows the inspiring relationship between whale whisperer Vicki Neville and the humpback whales of Australia. Never-before-seen behaviours have been documented by a team of five cinematographers over the three-month whale season in Hervey Bay, all captured in glorious 4K. These stunning close encounters capture whales like you have never seen them before!

programme.desc: It's journey's end as Sue reaches Istanbul. She has her fortune told, falls in love with Turkish delight and explores the world's largest underground caves.

programme.title: E6 - End Game
programme.desc: Our ancient powers have endured for centuries but destruction is close at hand. What will cause their downfall? And who will create a lasting legacy?

programme.title: E2 - Royals And Rebels
programme.desc: Alex and Nat meet a new guide, Sithu. Heading north, the team are trying to follow Tim's old road to India's notorious 'Wild West', but Sithu warns of an escalating civil war on the road ahead.

programme.title: E2 - Kenya
programme.desc: Robson heads to the east coast of Kenya, where the Indian Ocean offers some of the best game fishing in the world.

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: The lion pride males are injured and the mothers with cubs are left vulnerable after an attack; Xudum, the female leopard, takes risks to find a mate.

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: As he starts the final part of his journey deep into Iraq, Michael finds a local school in Baghdad and as he did in North Korea talks to the children about life in Iraq and what they hope to do in the future, and how they see the rest of the world. Michael then visits the ancient site of Babylon, a place he used to read about when he was studying the bible at school. He also gets access to enter the massive palace built by Saddam Hussein that overlooks the historic site.

programme.desc: As he starts the final part of his journey deep into Iraq, Michael finds a local school in Baghdad and as he did in North Korea talks to the children about life in Iraq and what they hope to do in the future, and how they see the rest of the world. Michael then visits the ancient site of Babylon, a place he used to read about when he was studying the bible at school. He also gets access to enter the massive palace built by Saddam Hussein that overlooks the historic site.

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: The lion pride males are injured and the mothers with cubs are left vulnerable after an attack; Xudum, the female leopard, takes risks to find a mate.

programme.desc: Robson heads to the east coast of Kenya, where the Indian Ocean offers some of the best game fishing in the world.

programme.title: Round Playlist
programme.desc: The program is intended to promote exchanges between Korea and ASEAN countries by utilizing popular music.

programme.title: E31
programme.desc: To Dan-dan, her family was an obstacle. She eventually leaves home and starts working as a resident tutor. And the more time she spends with the kids and their father, Young-guk, the more she falls for him.

programme.title: The Best Of Immortal Songs
programme.desc: The true classic of the century is born again! The legendary classic is reinterpreted by the best vocalists in Korea. Don't miss out on the heart-moving moments that transcend generations.

programme.title: Love My Scent
programme.desc: Chang-soo, a guy who has never been in a romantic relationship, earns a magical power after accidentally wearing a perfume he receives from a stranger. The supernatural power he earns is what any man would dream of, an ability to attract every woman in the world! Ara, a woman Chang-soo has been in love with, begins to sense the scent of Chang-soo and falls in love with him. While they gradually grow their connection, Ara's ex-boyfriend, James, suddenly appears and reveals Chang-soo's secret! Will the two people overcome this predicament and find true love in each other?

programme.title: Hail The Judge
programme.desc: Chau Wah-sing was a muddleheaded minor government official. A son of the Chief Commander raped the beautiful bride. However, Wah-sing was arrested since he wanted to help her...

programme.title: Wheels On Meals
programme.desc: Thomas and David are two quick-witted vendors hawking Chinese fast food from their truck in the busy squares of Barcelona. Their acquaintance with beautiful pickpocket, Sylvia, brings them in contact with novice detective Moby, who is trying to track her whereabouts. Sylvia is actually a wealthy heiress kidnapped by the evil count, who is trying to siphon off her inheritance. The trio puts a spanner in the count's plans, and rescue Sylvia...
